productName: Green Reaper - Reaper Diamonds (THCA) - Purple Cat Piss - 1g
description: This Purple Panties THCa is about as pure and potent as concentrates get — crystalline cannabinoid that comes alive with heat for a powerful, clean hit. Heat unlocks the power, a sweet grape-and-berry aroma with a relaxing, mellow feel, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
